strings.alarm_empty_hint: Utwórz pierwszy alarm, aby rozpocząć pracę z ShiftAlarm
strings.add_clock_hint: Naciśnij plus, aby dodać zegar światowy
strings.alarm_exact_permission_message: To save and turn on exact wake-up alarms, allow this app to schedule alarms in system settings.
strings.alarm_readiness_description: On some devices, especially Xiaomi/MIUI, alarms can be delayed or missed when the app is closed. Check the items below to improve reliability.
strings.alarm_xiaomi_tip_message: If alarms still work inconsistently when the app is closed, allow autostart for ShiftAlarm and remove battery restrictions in MIUI settings.
strings.alarm_notifications_not_ready: Notifications are disabled. Alarm alerts may be hidden or blocked.
strings.alarm_exact_not_ready: Exact alarms are not allowed. Wake-up alarms may not fire on time.
strings.alarm_battery_ready: Battery restrictions are relaxed for this app.
strings.alarm_battery_not_ready: Battery optimization is still active. Xiaomi/MIUI may delay or suppress alarms when the app is closed.
strings.alarm_app_settings_description: Open the app settings page to review autostart, background activity, lock screen behavior, and manufacturer-specific permissions.
strings.alarm_runtime_log_description: Open the full event log, then copy it and send it for analysis.
strings.alarm_module_rebuild_placeholder: Alarm module has been reset and is ready for clean rebuild.
strings.alarm_runtime_log_placeholder_descriptio: Previous alarm module was removed. Diagnostics will return after rebuild.
strings.alarm_diagnostics_unavailable_body: Alarm module was removed. Diagnostics will return after rebuild.
strings.alarm_time_section_body: Choose the time for the next wake-up alarm.
strings.alarm_ringing_hint: Wake up. The alarm is active.
strings.alarm_reliability_warning_body: Some required settings are not enabled. On certain devices, alarms may fail when the app is closed or removed from recent apps.
strings.alarm_delete_confirm_body: This alarm will be removed permanently.
strings.alarm_custom_sound_limit_body: You can save up to {count} custom sounds.
strings.alarm_sound_custom_limit_reached: You can save up to {count} custom sounds
strings.alarm_sound_delete_confirm_body: This sound will be removed from the list. Alarms using it will switch to the system sound.
strings.alarm_sound_limit_body: You can save up to {count} custom sounds.
strings.alarm_sound_duplicate_name_body: A custom sound with the same file name is already saved.
strings.alarm_invalid_date_time_past: The selected date and time must be later than the current time.
strings.alarm_past_date_not_allowed: You cannot create an alarm for a past date.
strings.alarm_gate_body: To ensure alarms work reliably, please allow the required settings and permissions.
strings.alarm_gate_warning: Without these settings alarms may NOT work when the app is closed.
strings.alarm_gate_battery_hint: Battery fix opens your app settings first. On some devices, then allow background usage or remove battery limits for this app.
strings.alarm_reliability_all_ready: Everything is configured. Alarms should work reliably.
strings.alarm_reliability_not_ready: Some settings may prevent alarms from working when the app is closed.
strings.alarm_reliability_important_hint: Important: the battery fix opens your app settings first. On some devices, then allow background usage or remove battery limits for this app.
strings.alarm_vendor_hint_body: On Xiaomi, Samsung and some other devices, additional battery restrictions may block alarms when the app is closed. If needed, open your app settings and allow background activity for this app.
strings.alarm_runtime_log_body: Open the diagnostics screen to inspect alarm events and reliability behavior.
strings.settings_permissions_section_ready: All required alarm permissions and reliability settings are configured.
strings.settings_permissions_section_not_ready: Check permissions and battery settings to make alarms work reliably.
strings.settings_diagnostics_section_body: Inspect alarm runtime events and reliability diagnostics.
strings.settings_theme_section_body: Choose the appearance mode and tactile feedback behavior.
strings.settings_haptic_body: Włącza krótką wibrację dla obsługiwanych działań w aplikacji.
strings.settings_language_sheet_body: Aplikacja automatycznie używa języka systemowego, jeśli jest dostępny. Tutaj możesz ręcznie pobrać i przełączyć inny obsługiwany język.
strings.settings_language_load_failed: Nie udało się załadować listy języków. Sprawdź połączenie i spróbuj ponownie.
strings.settings_language_download_failed: Nie udało się pobrać lub zainstalować wybranego języka.
strings.settings_contact_button_body: Otwórz aplikację e-mail i utwórz wiadomość do support@insdeco.ru.
strings.settings_contact_email_unavailable: Na tym urządzeniu nie ma dostępnej aplikacji e-mail.
strings.settings_permissions_button_body: Otwórz uprawnienia alarmów i ustawienia niezawodności.
strings.settings_diagnostics_button_body: Otwórz sekcje diagnostyczne dla różnych funkcji aplikacji.
strings.settings_language_button_body_short: Otwórz dostępne języki aplikacji i zarządzaj instalacją ręczną.
strings.settings_permissions_header_body: Tutaj zebrano uprawnienia alarmów i alarmów geolokalizacyjnych, dostęp do lokalizacji oraz ustawienia niezawodności zależne od urządzenia.
strings.settings_diagnostics_header_body: Tutaj zebrano sekcje diagnostyczne dla różnych funkcji aplikacji.
strings.settings_theme_header_body: Wybierz tryb wyglądu i zachowanie wibracji interfejsu.
strings.settings_diagnostics_master_body: Main switch for all diagnostic sections in the app.
strings.settings_diagnostics_alarm_body: Alarm delivery, scheduling, recovery, guard and ringing events.
strings.settings_diagnostics_timer_body: Timer start, pause, resume, reset, finish, restore, notification and finished-screen events.
strings.alarm_diagnostics_actions_body: Copy, clear or send the current alarm diagnostic report.
strings.alarm_diagnostics_send_hint: For diagnostic report delivery, it is recommended to choose an email app.
strings.alarm_diagnostics_clear_confirm_body: All stored diagnostic events will be permanently deleted.
strings.settings_diagnostics_clock_body: World clock list, restore flow, and add or remove time zone actions.
strings.clock_diagnostics_send_hint: For diagnostic report delivery, it is recommended to choose an email app.
strings.clock_runtime_log_empty_body: Use the world clock functions again and the event log will appear here.
strings.clock_diagnostics_clear_confirm_body: All stored clock diagnostic events will be permanently deleted.
strings.timer_diagnostics_send_hint: For diagnostic report delivery, it is recommended to choose an email app.
strings.timer_runtime_log_empty_body: Use the timer again and the event log will appear here.
strings.timer_diagnostics_clear_confirm_body: All stored timer diagnostic events will be permanently deleted.
strings.settings_diagnostics_stopwatch_body: Stopwatch start, pause, reset, lap, history, restore and notification events.
strings.stopwatch_diagnostics_send_hint: For diagnostic report delivery, it is recommended to choose an email app.
strings.stopwatch_runtime_log_empty_body: Use the stopwatch again and the event log will appear here.
strings.stopwatch_diagnostics_clear_confirm_body: All stored stopwatch diagnostic events will be permanently deleted.
strings.settings_backup_button_body: Utwórz plik kopii zapasowej z ustawieniami aplikacji, alarmami, zegarami, minutnikiem i danymi stopera.
strings.settings_backup_create_body: The backup includes settings, alarms, custom alarm sound references, world clocks, timer data, stopwatch data, notes and audio note files. Diagnostic logs are not included.
strings.settings_backup_header_body: Create a JSON backup file that you can save, send to yourself or upload to cloud storage. Restore validation is available before full import.
strings.settings_backup_restore_body: Select the previously created backup file. At this point, the app will verify the file and replace the current data.
strings.settings_backup_restore_confirm_body: Current app settings, alarms, clocks, timer, stopwatch data, notes and audio note files will be replaced by the selected backup file.
strings.settings_backup_restore_restart_body: Backup data was restored successfully. Restart the app so all restored settings, alarms, clocks, timer and stopwatch data are displayed correctly.
strings.settings_diagnostics_shifts_body: Shift schedules, overrides, backup, restore and calculation events.
strings.shift_diagnostics_send_hint: For diagnostic report delivery, it is recommended to choose an email app.
strings.shift_runtime_log_empty_body: Create or edit shift schedules and the event log will appear here.
strings.shift_diagnostics_clear_confirm_body: All stored shift diagnostic events will be permanently deleted.
strings.shifts_screen_header_body: The shift module storage layer is connected. Next step: list schedules and create templates.
strings.shifts_screen_status_body: Database, models, backup/restore and diagnostics are prepared. UI creation will be added step by step.
strings.shifts_empty_body: Create your first schedule from a template. The app will calculate shifts from a cycle, not from saved dates.
strings.shifts_list_header_body: Schedules are calculated from a start date and repeating pattern. Date changes will be handled later through overrides.
strings.shifts_create_body: Choose a template and start date. The schedule will be calculated from this cycle.
strings.shifts_delete_confirm_body: This shift schedule will be deleted permanently.
strings.calendar_change_shift_body: Create a one-day exception for this date
strings.shift_override_day_off_body: Replace the calculated shift with a personal day.
strings.shift_override_sick_body: Mark this date as sick leave.
strings.shift_override_custom_body: Replace this date with a custom shift placeholder.
strings.shift_override_no_active_schedule: Create or activate a shift schedule first.
strings.shifts_edit_body: Change the schedule name or start date. The pattern and overrides will remain unchanged.
strings.shifts_edit_template_locked: Template editing will be available later in the pattern builder.
strings.shifts_custom_pattern_body: Set the order of days in the repeating cycle. Time editing will be added later.
strings.shift_override_range_body: Choose one day or a date range for this exception.
strings.shift_override_range_start_locked: Start date is the selected calendar day.
strings.shift_override_range_end_body: Tap to choose the last date of the exception.
strings.shifts_templates_picker_body: Choose a ready-made shift schedule template.
strings.shifts_custom_create_body: Create your own repeating shift cycle.
strings.shift_override_range_picker_body: Start date is fixed. Select the end date.
strings.shift_override_replace_shift_body: Replace the selected date or range with a specific shift type.
strings.shift_override_edit_shift_body: Replace the selected date or range with a specific shift type and time.
strings.shifts_template_locked_hint: The work and day-off sequence is fixed for this template.
strings.shifts_next_day_time_hint: The shift ends on the next day.
strings.shifts_full_day_time_hint: Start and end time are the same. This is counted as a 24-hour shift.
strings.shifts_equal_time_warning_body: Start and end time are the same, so the shift will be counted as 24 hours. Are you sure the working time is selected correctly?
strings.shifts_statistics_body: Statistics are calculated only for this shift schedule.
strings.shifts_salary_body: Salary calculation will be added here later and will use only the selected schedule.
strings.shifts_salary_not_configured: Salary calculation is not configured yet
strings.shifts_salary_setup_body: At the next step, this screen will store salary settings and calculate income by the selected schedule.
strings.shifts_work_break_body: Configure whether break time is counted as work time.
strings.shifts_work_break_counted: Break is counted as work time
strings.shifts_work_break_not_counted: Break is subtracted from work time
strings.shifts_statistics_break_body: Set whether the break is included in paid working time.
strings.shifts_salary_deductions_body: Break deductions are already included in worked time. Use this field only for manual deductions.
strings.shifts_initial_setup_body: Complete the first setup. After saving, the start date and cycle structure will be locked to protect calendar changes.
strings.shifts_start_date_locked_body: The start date cannot be changed after the first save. This protects saved calendar changes, vacation days, sick days and personal days from being recalculated as a new schedule.
strings.shifts_cycle_locked_body: The cycle structure is locked after the first save. You can still edit shift start and end time.
strings.shift_override_edit_work_time_body: Adjust the worked time for this work shift.
strings.shift_override_work_adjustment_body: Add overtime or reduce worked time for this work day.
strings.shift_override_day_off_work_adjustment_b: Set the worked time for this day off. It can be counted as overtime.
strings.shift_override_work_adjustment_hint: If overtime is not enabled, added time is counted as regular worked time.
strings.shifts_salary_overtime_body: Overtime is taken from calendar shift changes. Only the multiplier can be edited here.
strings.shifts_salary_deductions_sheet_body: Add deduction rows for the selected salary period.
strings.shifts_salary_deduction_delete_body: This deduction row will be deleted without the ability to restore it.
strings.shifts_salary_bonuses_body: Add manual bonuses or calculate them as a percent of sales.
strings.shifts_salary_bonus_delete_body: This bonus row will be deleted without the ability to restore it.
strings.shifts_salary_validation_monthly_require: For monthly salary, fill in both monthly salary and monthly norm hours.
strings.shifts_salary_validation_bonus_percent_r: To save a percent-of-sales bonus with an amount, enter the bonus percent.
strings.shifts_report_body: Reports help compare completed periods, salary, work time, absences and adjustments.
strings.shifts_report_entry_body: Analyze completed periods, salary, work time, absences and comparisons.
strings.shifts_report_period_body: Choose the period that should be calculated in the report.
strings.shifts_report_status_completed_body: This period is completed. The report is calculated from saved schedule and salary data.
strings.shifts_report_status_preliminary_body: The period is not finished yet. Data is calculated up to today.
strings.shifts_report_status_upcoming_body: This period has not started yet. A report cannot be generated.
strings.shifts_report_short_summary: For {period}, you worked {hours}, earned {total}, and overtime was {overtime}.
strings.shifts_report_export_body: PDF, CSV, JSON, HTML and debug export will be added after report calculation is stabilized.
strings.shifts_report_daily_rows_entry_body: Open the detailed list of days for this report period.
strings.shifts_report_custom_period_body: Choose a specific month or set any start and end dates.
strings.shifts_report_compare_custom_periods_bod: Choose up to 8 months, or add custom date ranges.
strings.shifts_report_compare_custom_periods_lim: You can compare up to 8 periods.
strings.shifts_report_compare_empty_body: Choose completed periods or custom ranges to see comparison data.
strings.shifts_report_compare_delta_body: Each line shows how the next period changed compared with the previous one.
strings.shifts_report_export_screen_body: Save the currently generated report. JSON is best for full structured data, while CSV files are easier to open in spreadsheet apps.
strings.shifts_report_export_json_body: Full structured report for backup, diagnostics, developer analysis or later import-like processing.
strings.shifts_report_export_csv_summary_body: Compact table with salary, work time, absences and period metrics. Suitable for spreadsheets.
strings.shifts_report_export_csv_daily_body: Detailed table with one row per day: shift type, time, duration, overtime, break, adjustment and note.
strings.shifts_report_export_pdf_body: Readable report file for sharing, printing or saving outside the app.
strings.shifts_report_export_html_body: Readable web-format report with sections and daily rows. Suitable for browser viewing and later printing.
strings.alarm_shift_linked_body: The alarm will ring before the next working shift in the active schedule.
strings.alarm_shift_linked_no_active_schedule: No active shift schedule. Create or activate a schedule first.
strings.alarm_shift_linked_no_active_schedule_er: Create or activate a shift schedule first.
strings.alarm_shift_linked_offset_hint: Range: from 1 minute to 24 hours before shift start.
strings.alarm_shift_linked_fixed_time_summary: At {time} on the shift start day
strings.alarm_shift_linked_fixed_time_hint: If this time has already passed for the current shift, the alarm will use the next matching shift.
strings.alarm_shift_linked_invalid_offset_error: Select when the alarm should ring before the shift starts.
strings.alarm_shift_schedule_inactive_warning: The shift schedule is turned off. Activate the work schedule to enable this alarm.
strings.shift_alarm_enable_dialog_body: The schedule "{schedule}" is active. Enable alarms linked to this schedule? Count: {count}.
strings.shift_alarm_auto_disabled_schedule_inact: Shift alarms were turned off because the schedule is no longer active.
strings.shift_alarm_auto_enabled_schedule_active: Shift alarms were enabled after schedule activation.
strings.alarm_shift_linked_schedule_inactive_hin: This alarm is turned off because its shift schedule is inactive. Activate the schedule to use this alarm.
strings.shift_alarms_section_body: Alarms linked to this schedule ring before working shifts.
strings.shift_alarms_schedule_inactive_body: This schedule is inactive. Shift alarms can be created, but they can only be enabled after the schedule is activated.
strings.shift_alarms_initial_setup_body: Save the initial schedule setup first. After that, the alarm can be correctly linked to this schedule.
strings.shifts_delete_confirm_shift_alarms_body: {count} linked shift alarms will be turned off.
strings.alarm_shift_linked_shift_kind_body: Choose which shifts this alarm should ring for.
strings.shift_alarm_choose_kind_body: This schedule has multiple work shift types. Choose which shift this alarm should be created for.
strings.notes_body: Text notes are stored locally. This foundation is prepared for structured notes, reminders, audio and voice-to-text later.
strings.notes_empty_body: Create your first text note. Structured notes, reminders and audio will be added later.
strings.notes_empty_validation: Add a title or text before saving.
strings.notes_search_empty_body: Try another search query or clear the search.
strings.notes_delete_confirm_body: This note will be removed from the notes list.
strings.settings_diagnostics_notes_body: Note creation, editing, archiving, deleting, backup and restore events.
strings.notes_runtime_log_empty_body: Create, edit or archive notes and the event log will appear here.
strings.notes_diagnostics_actions_body: Copy, clear or send the current notes diagnostic report.
strings.notes_diagnostics_clear_confirm_body: All stored notes diagnostic events will be permanently deleted.
strings.notes_checklist_editor_hint: Add checklist items. Use the + button or the keyboard action to add the next item.
strings.notes_unsaved_changes_body: Save your changes before leaving this note?
strings.notes_notification_channel_description: Notifications for note reminders and events
strings.calendar_note_type_title: What do you want to create?
strings.calendar_add_note_body: Create an event or reminder for this date
strings.notes_advance_reminder_empty_enabled_hin: Add at least one advance reminder or turn this option off.
strings.notes_advance_reminder_picker_body: Choose how long before the selected time the reminder should fire.
strings.notes_advance_reminder_unavailable_past: There is no available time before this event. Move the event to the future first.
strings.notes_open_unavailable: This note is no longer available.
strings.notes_notification_channel_description_v: High-priority notifications for note reminders and events
strings.notes_audio_permission_body: Allow microphone access to record audio notes.
strings.notes_audio_stop_before_save: Stop the recording before leaving or saving.
strings.notes_audio_storage_error: Failed to save the audio file
strings.notes_voice_transcript_architecture_read: Voice transcript is prepared as a separate note type. Speech recognition will be connected in the next step.
strings.notes_voice_transcript_manual_edit_hint: You can edit transcript text manually.
strings.notes_voice_transcript_ready: Tap Start recognition and speak. You can edit the result manually before saving.
strings.notes_transcript_unavailable: Speech recognition is unavailable on this device
strings.notes_transcript_stop_before_close: Stop recognition before closing the note
strings.notes_voice_transcript_language_locked: Language cannot be changed while recognition is running.
strings.notes_voice_transcript_backup_ready: Transcript text and metadata are included in backup and restore.
strings.notes_voice_transcript_offline_placehold: Offline speech models will be connected later.
strings.notes_voice_transcript_dictation_active_: Dictation stays active until you press Stop.
strings.notes_voice_transcript_settings_body: Online recognition is usually more accurate because it can use the system or cloud recognition features of the device. Offline mode works without internet, but quality may be lower because processing runs on the phone and depends on the selected model.
strings.notes_voice_transcript_offline_model_mis: Offline model is not installed yet. Download will be added in the offline module step.
strings.notes_voice_transcript_settings_locked: Settings cannot be changed while dictation is active. Stop recognition first.
strings.notes_transcript_offline_model_missing: Offline speech model is not installed.
strings.settings_speech_models_button_body: Pobieraj i zarządzaj modelami zamiany mowy na tekst do rozpoznawania offline.
strings.settings_speech_models_header_body: Download speech models for offline voice-to-text recognition. Models are stored locally and checked with SHA-256 before installation.
strings.settings_speech_models_load_failed: Failed to load the speech models manifest. Check your connection and try again.
strings.settings_speech_models_empty: No speech models are available yet.
strings.notes_voice_transcript_offline_no_models: No offline models are installed. Open Offline speech models in Settings and download a model first.
strings.notes_voice_transcript_offline_quality_h: Offline recognition works without internet. Quality depends on the selected model, phone performance and microphone conditions. For maximum accuracy, use online recognition.
strings.notes_voice_transcript_offline_quality_s: Offline quality may be lower than online because processing runs on the phone.
strings.geo_alarm_empty_body: Utwórz alarm lokalizacyjny dla wejścia lub wyjścia z wybranego obszaru.
strings.geo_alarm_stage1_body: This step stores geo alarms, diagnostics and backup data. Location permissions and real geofence delivery will be connected in the next step.
strings.geo_alarm_transition_enter_or_exit: Przy wejściu lub wyjściu z obszaru
strings.geo_alarm_delete_confirm_body: Ten alarm geolokalizacyjny zostanie trwale usunięty.
strings.geo_alarm_invalid_data: Check geo alarm data and try again.
strings.settings_diagnostics_geo_alarm_body: Geo alarm creation, editing, backup, restore and future geofence delivery events.
strings.geo_alarm_runtime_log_empty_body: Create or edit geo alarms and the event log will appear here.
strings.geo_alarm_diagnostics_clear_confirm_body: All stored geo alarm diagnostic events will be permanently deleted.
strings.geo_alarm_stage2_body: Location permissions and geofence registration are connected. When a saved area is triggered, the app writes diagnostics and shows a notification. Full ringing will be connected in the next step.
strings.geo_alarm_runtime_package2_body: Geofence registration, boot restore, transition receiver, diagnostics and notification delivery are enabled.
strings.geo_alarm_reliability_body: Location-based alarms need location access, background location and notifications. Android may still delay geofence events to save battery.
strings.geo_alarm_permission_precise_missing: Tylko przybliżona lokalizacja lub brak lokalizacji
strings.geo_alarm_permission_background_missing: Zezwól cały czas w ustawieniach aplikacji
strings.geo_alarm_vendor_hint_body: On Xiaomi, Redmi, POCO, MIUI or HyperOS, also allow autostart and remove battery restrictions for ShiftAlarm. Otherwise geofence events may arrive late.
strings.geo_alarm_stage21_body: This step adds permission shortcuts, reliability hints and richer diagnostics. Full ringing will be connected after geofence behavior is confirmed.
strings.geo_alarm_ringing_channel_description: Geo alarm sound, vibration and full-screen notifications
strings.geo_alarm_cooldown_hint_body: Repeated triggers of the same geo alarm transition may be ignored for a few minutes to avoid duplicate ringing near the zone border.
strings.geo_alarm_duplicate_protection_body: Duplicate protection: the same enter or exit event will not ring again for 3 minutes. The opposite event can still ring.
strings.geo_alarm_map_location_unavailable: Current location is unavailable. Try again outdoors or check location settings.
strings.geo_alarm_map_existing_alarm_body: Selected geo alarm on the map.
strings.geo_alarm_map_bookmarks_later: Saved places will be added in a separate step.
strings.geo_alarm_map_provider_later: Google Maps, Yandex Maps, satellite and hybrid layers are reserved for later packages. The current package uses OpenStreetMap.
strings.geo_alarm_radius_step_hint: Radius changes in 200 m steps. Maximum: 5000 m.
strings.geo_alarm_radius_reliability_warning: Radius below 800 m may trigger later because of battery saving and location accuracy.
strings.geo_alarm_radius_android_hint: For a reliable geo alarm, 800–1000 m is recommended.
strings.geo_alarm_map_search_not_found: Address was not found. Try a full query: city, street and house number.
strings.geo_alarm_map_reverse_geocode_online_fir: Address lookup uses online data first, then device geocoder if network is unavailable.
strings.geo_alarm_trigger_hint: The geo alarm will turn on when the selected location condition is detected.
strings.geo_alarm_location_hint_read_only: The point is selected on the map. Here you can edit only the displayed address.
strings.geo_alarm_schedule_type_hint: This alarm uses a selected map area instead of a clock time.
strings.geo_alarm_readiness_disabled_hint: Enable the geo alarm on the map screen to register its geofence.
strings.geo_alarm_readiness_ready_hint: Permissions are configured. Geo alarm registration should work.
strings.geo_alarm_readiness_location_hint: Allow location permission to register the selected area.
strings.geo_alarm_readiness_background_hint: Allow location access all the time for reliable triggering when the app is closed.
strings.geo_alarm_readiness_notification_hint: Allow notifications so the geo alarm can show ringing alerts.
strings.geo_alarm_readiness_google_play_hint: Google Play services are required for Android geofencing on this device.
strings.geo_alarm_readiness_setup_hint: Save the geo alarm and the app will register the geofence.
strings.geo_alarm_readiness_error_hint: Check permissions and diagnostics if registration fails.
strings.alarm_duration_hint: The alarm will stop automatically after the selected duration.
strings.geo_alarm_schedule_mode_always_hint: The geo alarm is active every day while enabled.
strings.geo_alarm_schedule_mode_one_time_hint: After the first successful activation, the geo alarm will be turned off.
strings.geo_alarm_schedule_mode_repeat_days_hint: The geo alarm rings only on selected weekdays.
strings.geo_alarm_schedule_mode_shift_linked_hin: The geo alarm rings only on selected work shifts.
strings.geo_alarm_repeat_days_required: Select at least one day for this geo alarm.
strings.geo_alarm_shift_schedule_empty: No shift schedules yet. Create a schedule first.
strings.geo_alarm_shift_schedule_body: This geo alarm uses the active shift schedule only.
strings.geo_alarm_shift_schedule_required: Activate a shift schedule before saving a shift-linked geo alarm.
strings.geo_alarm_shift_timing_body: Choose whether this geo alarm is active on the shift day, the day before it, or the day after it.
strings.geo_alarm_bookmark_remove_alarm_confirm_: Only the saved-place entry will be removed. The geo alarm itself will remain.
strings.geo_alarm_bookmark_remove_point_confirm_: Only this saved point will be removed. Geo alarms will not be changed.
strings.geo_alarm_map_location_permission_body: Allow location permission to show your current place on the map.
strings.geo_alarm_shift_schedule_no_active: No active shift schedule. Activate a shift schedule first.
strings.geo_alarm_shift_schedule_active_body: This geo alarm will be linked to the active shift schedule.
strings.geo_alarm_shift_schedule_inactive_body: This geo alarm is linked to a shift schedule that is not active now.
strings.geo_alarm_shift_before_window_body: The geo alarm is active only inside this time window before the shift starts.
strings.geo_alarm_shift_after_until_crossing_val: Active after shift until first geofence crossing
strings.geo_alarm_shift_after_until_crossing_bod: If the geofence is not crossed, the pending after-shift activation is reset when the next shift starts or at the end of the day.
strings.geo_alarm_shift_after_until_crossing_she: Active after shift until first geofence crossing
strings.geo_alarm_map_offline_cache_body: The map will show saved areas if they were opened earlier. Missing areas will load again when internet is available.
strings.widget_config_4x2_body: Choose two buttons to show on the widget.
strings.widget_config_4x3_body: Choose two information buttons. Today and clock are always shown at the top.
strings.widget_config_calendar_4x4_v2_body: Choose two compact buttons. The calendar and tomorrow schedule are always shown.
strings.alarm_repeat_after_ignored_body: If the alarm rings to the end without dismiss or snooze, ShiftAlarm will ring again.
strings.settings_speech_models_download_continue: Model downloads continue even if you leave this screen.
strings.settings_permissions_alarm_geo_summary_b: Skonfiguruj niezawodność alarmów, dostęp do lokalizacji dla alarmów geolokalizacyjnych i ustawienia baterii w jednym miejscu.
strings.settings_permissions_geo_first_launch_bo: Alarmy geolokalizacyjne wymagają dostępu do lokalizacji, dokładnej lokalizacji i lokalizacji w tle, aby działać, gdy aplikacja jest zamknięta. Możesz włączyć je w ustawieniach aplikacji.
strings.settings_permissions_unrestricted_body: Aby alarmy i alarmy geolokalizacyjne działały niezawodnie, usuń ograniczenia baterii dla ShiftAlarm. Na Xiaomi/Redmi i podobnych urządzeniach włącz też autostart/pracę w tle, jeśli taka opcja jest dostępna.
strings.settings_backup_save_body: Create a backup file and choose where to save it on this device.
strings.settings_backup_share_body: Create a backup file and open the system share sheet to send it to email, messenger or cloud storage.
strings.settings_backup_export_save_success_body: The backup file was saved to the selected location.
strings.settings_backup_export_save_error_body: Failed to save the backup file.
strings.settings_backup_export_share_success_bod: Choose where to send or upload the backup file.
strings.settings_backup_export_share_error_body: Failed to create or share the backup file.
strings.shifts_salary_deduction_constant_carry_h: Constant deductions are carried to the next month automatically.
strings.settings_legal_button_body: Otwórz regulamin, politykę prywatności, zastrzeżenie i instrukcję obsługi.
strings.legal_documents_intro_body: Otwórz wbudowane dokumenty offline. Zdalne aktualizacje i akceptacja przy pierwszym uruchomieniu zostaną dodane w następnym pakiecie.
strings.legal_privacy_body: Jak obsługiwane są lokalne dane aplikacji, diagnostyka i pobieranie.
strings.legal_disclaimer_body: Ważne ograniczenia niezawodności alarmów, powiadomień i geostref.
strings.legal_help_body: Instrukcja offline dla głównych funkcji aplikacji.
strings.onboarding_step_welcome_body: ShiftAlarm łączy grafiki zmian, alarmy, alarmy geolokalizacyjne, notatki, widżety i narzędzia kopii zapasowej. Ekran główny jest już dostępny za tym oknem konfiguracji.
strings.onboarding_step_documents_body: Otwórz dokumenty aplikacji i zaakceptuj wymagane wersje. Wyjaśniają one regulamin, prywatność oraz ograniczenia niezawodności alarmów, powiadomień i alarmów geolokalizacyjnych.
strings.onboarding_documents_required_pending: Wymagane dokumenty nie zostały jeszcze zaakceptowane.
strings.onboarding_step_permissions_body: Uprawnienia nie są potrzebne do przeglądania aplikacji, ale alarmy, przypomnienia i alarmy geolokalizacyjne zależą od powiadomień, dokładnych alarmów, lokalizacji i ustawień baterii.
strings.onboarding_permissions_finish_hint: Możesz zakończyć teraz i wrócić do uprawnień później w Ustawieniach.
